CustomField.description: Stores the Id of the FinServ__FinancialGoal__c source row that the parity batch projected into this standard FinancialGoal record. Acts as the external key for upsert-by-legacy-Id idempotency.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscParityBatch. Equals the 18-char Id of the legacy FSC FinancialGoal that this standard record mirrors. Do not edit.
CustomField.label: Legacy Id
